sections.paragraph:
(“the face of God,” from the obsolete sing. פְּנוּ, for פָּנִים; comp. מְתוּ, pl. מְתִים), [Penuel], pr.n.-

(1) of a town beyond Jordan, Gen 32:32 (where the account is given of the origin of the name); Jud. 8:8 once פְּנִיאֵל (id.), Gen 32:31.-(2) m.-(a) 1Ch 8:25, פִּנִיאֵל קרי.-(b) 1Ch 4:4.
